The '''Kas tank''' was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] tank model employed by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]].

==Description==
It had a crew of two, a pilot in the front cockpit and a gunner in the rear cockpit. It was armed with a heavy laser cannon mounted outside the cockpit, and was effective against enemy armor. The Kas tank also had room for transporting more troopers.

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], when Chief [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]] assisted [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] in retrieving the [[Vor'Na'Tu]] during the [[Krantian Civil War]], his contingent of Wookiee warriors included Kas tanks.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
